_meta.description: CANONICAL BUSINESS FACTS — the single source of truth. Edit prices, timelines, and contact facts HERE and only here. company.mjs re-exports this file for every generated surface (blog templates, llms.txt, facts.json, emails, the booking Function); scripts/render-facts.mjs stamps it into the data-fact spans in committed HTML; scripts/check-facts.mjs and scripts/check-llms.mjs fail the build on any drift.
